name: Cool Tropical Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Mango chunks or melon balls
1 cup Diced papaya or fresh mango
2 cups Plain or vanilla yogurt (vanilla preferred)
2 tablespoons Honey (omit if using vanilla yogurt)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pineapple into quarters, lengthwise.
2. Remove the core and slice the pineapple from the shell to create cubes.
3. Refrigerate the empty pineapple shell until serving time.
4. In a bowl, mix 1 cup of cubed pineapple with mango and papaya chunks.
5. Chill the mixture.
6. To serve, place 1/3 cup of yogurt in each pineapple shell.
7. Cover with mixed fruit pieces (mango, papaya, peaches).
8. Drizzle a layer of remaining yogurt sweetened with honey over the fruit.
9. Garnish each serving with whole strawberries and a sprig of fresh mint.
Makes 4 generous servings.
